scene: House Miltiades expands the bilingual school and seeks patrons for Gaulish-speaking tutors.

choices.label: Fund two tutors
choices.resultText: Children swap languages in the courtyard. The future sounds like both.

choices.label: Give a token sum
choices.resultText: Every drachma helps, they say, politely.

scene: A Gaulish envoy from the Salyes arrives. The party needs a host with a good table.

choices.label: Host the feast
choices.resultText: Mead and Massaliote wine at one table. History smiles.

choices.label: Attend another's feast
choices.resultText: Good food, better contacts, no bill.

scene: A party family arranges a marriage with a Ligurian noble line and asks you to bless it publicly.

choices.label: Speak at the wedding
choices.resultText: Protis and Gyptis are invoked. The old story still works.

choices.label: Send a gift, skip the speech
choices.resultText: Present in silver, absent in person.

scene: The party drafts a charter opening two new river trading posts to mixed Greek-Gaulish partnerships.

choices.label: Invest early
choices.resultText: Your stake is registered. Upriver, posts are already rising.

choices.label: Study the numbers first
choices.resultText: The margins look real. So does the risk.

scene: House Herakleides proposes posting key laws in both Greek and Gaulish script in the agora.

choices.label: Champion the proposal
choices.resultText: Law that can be read is law that can be trusted, you argue.

choices.label: Pay for the stone itself
choices.resultText: Your name, small but legible, at the base of the stele.

scene: A Gaulish wise-man - some say druid - asks to observe the rites of Artemis as a guest.

choices.label: Escort him yourself
choices.resultText: He watches in silence, then shares grove-lore in return. Eyes follow you both.

choices.label: Arrange it through intermediaries
choices.resultText: It happens. Your fingerprints, mostly, do not.

scene: The party proposes joint road patrols with friendly Ligurian warriors against bandits.

choices.label: Ride with the first patrol
choices.resultText: Shield beside shield-shape. Different songs, same road.

choices.label: Supply provisions instead
choices.resultText: An army of two cultures still marches on its stomach.

scene: The party wants a stirring speech in the agora: Massalia as bridge between worlds.

choices.label: Give the speech
choices.resultText: Bridge, not wall. The phrase outlives the afternoon.

choices.label: Write it for another to deliver
choices.resultText: Your words, his voice, the party's gain.

scene: A program places Gaulish youths as apprentices in Greek workshops. One is assigned to you.

choices.label: Teach him properly
choices.resultText: Quick hands, quicker questions. The work improves, surprisingly.

choices.label: Use him for errands only
choices.resultText: He learns the streets, not the craft. Word gets back.

scene: Followers of Pytheas seek backers for a coastal survey beyond the Pillars, updating his charts of the tin routes.

choices.label: Back the expedition
choices.resultText: If they return, your name goes on the chart's dedication.

choices.label: Just buy a copy of the old charts
choices.resultText: On the Ocean, secondhand, sea-stained, priceless.
